description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python Docker image with a .cache/ cache and defines variables DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, XDG_CACHE_HOME=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cache, and _APT_PACKAGE_NAMES='graphviz

    libgl1-mesa-glx

    '. Define a single stage test and a hidden .test_common template that runs apt-get update --quiet --quiet --yes, apt-get install --quiet --quiet --yes ${_APT_PACKAGE_NAMES}, and python3 -m pip --quiet install tox. Add three jobs: test_python35 using the python:3.5 image, test_python36 using the python:3.6 image, and test_python37 using the python:3.7 image; each inherits the before_script and runs python3 -m tox -e py35, python3 -m tox -e py36, and python3 -m tox -e py37 respectively. All jobs belong to the test stage and use the defined cache.
